notice: Maintenance & failover truth: every notice declares whether it is a maintenance, drain, failover, or tenant-migration window, the exact window time / timezone / offset, the affected deployment scope and write classes, which queued publish-later or local-draft work survives (kept separate from successful hosted mutations), what stays local-safe, and any changed tenant / region / endpoint boundary. A notice reads as current only while it is active and its last refresh is current — otherwise it downgrades and names why, and never collapses into a generic degraded banner. Shell, activity history, CLI / headless inspect, diagnostics, and support exports read this record verbatim.
title: Provider review read-only window
summary: Hosted writes pause; reads, local edits, and queued work continue.

affected_scope.scope_summary: Managed-cloud provider review and merge queue in US-east.

boundary_change.summary: No boundary change during the read-only window.

blocked_writes.note: Comments queue for publish-later; replay is idempotent.
Provider publish is captured as a local draft to publish after the window.

succeeded_hosted_mutations.note: Merge enqueue landed before the read-only window.

retained_local_safe_capabilities: Cached provider snapshots remain inspectable with a freshness label.
local_continuity.continuity_summary: Local edits and cached reads continue; hosted writes wait for the window to end.

display_copy.primary_status_line: Read-only window: Hosted writes pause; reads, local edits, and queued work continue.
display_copy.scope_line: Managed-cloud provider review and merge queue in US-east.
display_copy.queued_preserved_line: 2 intents preserved (1 publish-later queued, 1 local drafts); they survive the window.
display_copy.succeeded_line: 1 hosted mutations already landed and are listed separately from queued work.
display_copy.local_continuity_line: Local edits and cached reads continue; hosted writes wait for the window to end.
display_copy.boundary_change_line: No tenant / region / endpoint boundary change.
display_copy.follow_up_line: Queued and local-draft work will replay when the window resumes.
